feed.title: SAP Community - Settlement Management
feed.subtitle: Settlement Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Settlement Management Chargeback Process
entry.content:
Hi,

had one question for which i have not been able to find the answer. there are 2 document types in Settlement Management

0PS1 Purchase rebate : Chargeback

0PS1 Purchasing Rebate : Billing Document

for the above contract types i could not find anything on how the process should be run. My client requirement is to have the chargeback process but my business volume in above case does not get updated even when the relevant documents are created. not sure what i am missing and there is no process flow availaible as well for the same.

entry.title: I want to know table name which stores status of release in WCOCO t code
entry.content:
TCODE : WCOCO

Question : After release i want to know status of table ?

entry.title: BAPI_INTERNALORDER_CREATE for BAPI i need to update create order for condition contract
entry.content:
TCODE : ko03

BAPI : BAPI_INTERNALORDER_CREATE

Question : I want to fill ccs contract no from BAPI show in above screenshot

entry.title: Accrual by fixed amount without business volume
entry.content:
Hi all, I have a requirement to recognise the accrued amount as part of cutover activity. I am thinking of doing a fixed amount accrual by creating and adding a condition type ZREA (copy of REA1) on the sales condition contract. I have also created a condition type ZRED (copy of RED1 and this reference the condition type ZREA) and have this condition type assigned to the pricing procedure. I am able to maintain an amount against ZREA on the sales condition contract. However, on running the delta accrual settlement (no business volume), I encountered an error WS897 Internal error: No entry in KOMLFAC for $$00000001 000001 etc.

I found a note 3339039 pointing to settings in config doc but I am not clear where the config has gone wrong. Appreciate any pointers on the above. Cheers.

entry.title: Output for settlement documents using conditioning technique
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are doing an S4HANA ON PREMISE release 2022 implementation. We are not using FIORI, but good old GUI.

I get the impression that for output for settlement documents only BRF+ can be used. Is this assumption correct?

If it is possible to still use the conditioning technique for output of settlement documents, are there any special settings I need to do?

Kind regards

Rudy Zijp

entry.title: Posted Accruals not getting reversed during Delta Accruals Settlement
entry.content:
We're implementing Condition Contract Management in SAP ERP release under Global Trade - Compensation Management. The delta accrual functionality is active.

When creating the first DA document, business volume is determined correctly and the equivalent of condition type RED1 gets calculated as expected. WCOCOF table is updated properly as well.(

When creating subsequent DA, business volume is determined for the accumulated volume and the again the equivalent of RED1 condition as expected, however to get the delta accrual, system should then transfer via settlement program the already posted accruals using condition type RED2 so we only post the delta accrual amount.

Example:

Dec 10/2023 - Invoice 1 - 10,000 USD

Dec 11/2023 - Invoice 2 - 20,000 USD

Rebate Program = 5%

1. Delta Accrual - Dec 10/2023

BV = 10,000 USD

RED1 5% = 500

Net Amount = 500

2. Delta Accrual - Dec 11/2023

BV = 30,000 USD

RED1 5% = 1500

RED2 = -500 *** This condition is missing, not calculated by settlement program ****

Net Amount = 1000

This is causing over accruals as the total amount gets calculated all over again instead of posting only Delta.

The configuration for the Accrual Groups has been done to transfer from equivalent conditions REA1 to REA2 (During Final Settlement) and to RED2 (During DA settlement). I even included another lines to transfer from RES1 and RED1 but did not work either.

Another important thing to mention, when accruals gets posted via billing documents, they get reversed during final settlement using equivalent condition REA2 which is what is configured in the accrual groups but not if accruals are coming from Delta Accruals. I even added another flag in configuration of the contract to include Accruals from Sales and Accruals from Agency Business.

Has anyone faced similar issue? - if so, could you please explain how it was resolved?

Any help/hint is highly appreciated as I have searched everywhere.

Thanks,Yesenia Alvarez

entry.title: Settlement Management to post Multiple settlement documents in S4 HANA IN Rebates
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have a Question of Rebates settlement concept where we got one Requirement where users want to create multiple settlement documents to be created based on the contract start data and contract end date. do we have any standard procedure apart from partial settlement to have implemented in S4 Hana rebate settlement.

entry.title: Sales Commission for External Sales Agent Tax issue in S4 HanaC
entry.content:
Hi Team,

While doing settlement for external sales agent in S4 Hana i m getting the below error searched for all the blogs. but i don't find any solution can you pls throw some light on this issue.

WB2R_SV : t code used

2023-12-16-17-17-22.png

entry.title: SAP Condition Contract Management - use of different Rebate and Accrual condition types
entry.content:
Hello,

is there anyone who already implemented different condition types for final and accrual settlements in one condition contract? And these rebate/accrual condition types refer to different account keys which derive different accounts? I have some issues with the reversal accruals not being split up and consequently not posting to the correct accounts. Any ideas about configuration settings to be done? Many thanks!

The following config node is already implemented to obtain he correct accrual reversals , however it is not giving me the correct result yet.

entry.title: SAP_Condition Contract_SY530 Exception error when running WB2R_SC
entry.content:
Hi experts,

i have the aim to save accruals and settlements documents into the WB2_D_BVDETAIL table; in order to do that, i've set the "Z" entry into the below customizing path.

Once set, everything works well; whenever i run the WB2R_SC the system stores the documents accordingly.

There is anyway a specific case in which i got an error.

I set a condition contract having material codes specified into the standard table "V 163 Condition contract / Material",

When running the WB2R_SC, the system creates the accrual document but it get at the same time the error "SY530 - An exception was raised"

Due to that, the WB2_D_BVDETAIL table is not updated.

Do you have any hint on that? why this table does not work with agreements having materials specified into its condition?

Thanks and regards

Pier Paolo

entry.title: Customizing Error: Field does not exist in Business Volume Table Message No. WB2R061
entry.content:
hi,

we are using a custom field in the business volume table and getting the below error message at the time of settlement

Customizing Error: Field ZKUNAK does not exist in Business Volume Table Z_VWB2_VBRKVBRP

Message No. WB2R061

anyone any idea what could be issue ? i have not been able to find anything yet on this ?

entry.title: Will locking/unlocking WBS elements cause costs to move after settlement?
entry.content: Will locking/unlocking WBS elements cause costs to move after settlement? My understanding is that it will not cause costs to move and will only prevent additional costs from being added to the locked WBS elements, but I want to make sure I am correct. Right now, I have been locking the WBS elements to prevent additional costs from being added, but it is preventing the finance team from being able to run the settlement and month's end. If it does cause costs to move, in what way? Also, is there a way to lock WBS elements to prevent additional costs from accruing while allowing for settlement to occur?

entry.title: Issue Triggering TAX condition type from pricing procedure in Sales Rebate Settlement
entry.content: What must we do or configure so that SAP correctly calculates the tax in the part settlement or final settlement documents in sales Rebates, if we have the plant and incoterm values within the access sequence in the sales and invoice flows. We can have in a contract, sales flows with the same client, but with different plants that have different taxes depending on the combination of plant/incoterm

entry.title: CCM Delta accrual for credit note
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I noticed that CCM is generating positive Delta accruals for Credit memos for returns. Shouldnt these be negative Delta accruals? Please advise how to set Delta accruals to be generated for negative amounts (as opposed to positive Delta accruals for normal sales invoices).

 

Thanks

entry.title: FOC item exclusion in Condition Contract Settlement
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a scenario on Condition Contract Settlement on basis of material quantity, we have requirement system shouldn't consider settlement calculation for FOC item (Item Category TANN).

Is there any provision where I can stop system to stop calculate FOC item settlement because we have already given item at Zero value if we are giving again rebate for the same item it is loss to the company.

Is there any BADI where sometime I can stop rebate calculating for FOC item.

Thanks in Advance.

Regards

Prasant Ray

entry.title: Conditon contract Management exclude billing documents for Settlement
entry.content:
My customer was using the old SD Bonus. When they did the debit note for the bonus, they adapted the final debit note manually.

Now, we are introducing the new Condition Contract Management (CCM) with S/4.

And they asked me if for the settlemente of the contract there is a possibility to exclude billing documents for the final settlement document. 

e.g. for condition contract 10, following faktura are relevant:

But for any reason they say, that they don't want they don't want the faktura 5057977 be included in the partial settlement. Before this was done manually. can this be done in the standard, too?

At the moment i´m doing the settlement via WB2R_SV for Sales Bonus.

Is there any way to fullfill their expectating in the standard? I am not experienced with the manual settlement.

entry.title: How to create rebate basis 2 in the business volume
entry.content:
Hello all

I have requirement of to bring sell out data into the business volume table

Can you please let me know how to configure rebate basis 2 to put my sell out data.

 

I will bring sellout data via idoc

entry.title: S4HANA Settlement Management : Process Overview
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

       The title of this blog might be intriguing about what new content this would bring in and I will try a bit to explain before I get to in to the actual subject. 

The white papers published for Settlement management are indeed excellent in content and very much self explanatory. This blog is a small effort sum up the process in setting up all the individual elements right from the Condition contract type to posting settlement documents and sending the corresponding values to CO-PA.

I have tried to mention the SAP standard document types that are connected to each other in the process and will be useful in making (or understanding) a simple standard Sales Rebate process in S4 HANA. 

Here is the sequence of Operations that should be rendered:

1. Creation of Condition Contract Type (0S01- Standard Sales CC)

2. Process Variant Creation : A very useful feature and plays an important role in account determination if used as a access sequence in VKOA settings. 

 3. Condition Type group for allowed Rebate conditions (Standard Sales Group is 0S01)

 4. Business Volume Profile creation (Standard provided is 0S01)

5. Settlement Document Creation for Delta Accruals (Standard Doc for DA is 0S42)  ( Standard Settlement Process type associated is 0S40)

6.  Settlement Document Creation for Settlement (Standard Doc is 0S12) (Standard Settlement Process Process type associated is 0S10)

7.  Allowed combination per Settlement Process type and Settlement Documents (Standard assignment can be checked in the Navigation provided in the white paper and config guide. You can already guess that the combination 0S12 +0S10 and 0S42+0S40  is provided).

8.  Creation of Condition types for Accrual Reversals and Accrual Totals (Standard condition types are REA2 and RED2 respectively- which can eb checked in V/06).

9. Define and Configure Condition Type Group Accrual (Standard group for Accrual is 0S01)

10.  Specify Settlement Settings for Condition Contract Type : This is a very important step which combines/assigns all the above to a Condition Contract type and makes one body which produces the results as required. 

11.  Adjusting the Pricing procedures for Accrual and Settlements (The standard Pricing Procedures provided for Sales are A10005 for settlement and A10006 for Delta Accrual posting)

12.  Pricing Procedure Determination. (There is indeed a Schema group assigned in the Settlement documents which will be used as a Parameter to determine the Settlement pricing Procedure. Standard Schema group for Sales provided is 0S)

13. G/L Account Assignment in VKOA. (Standard condition table provided is 016 and this access has got Process variant as a parameter in determining the G/L accounts. Please be informed at this point that SAP has provided a new Account determination procedure KORS00 specifically for Settlement management. We may don't have to use KOFK or KOFI procedures). 

14. COPA Assignment in KE4I (CO-PA values field assignment for All the condition types involved in the process. All means - The rebate, accrual, accrual total, accrual reversal , partial settlement, partial settlement reversals, adjustments and verified condition types)

The above presented is a simple overview on how to analyze/decode the process of Rebate/Settlement in new S4 HANA. There are very many other settings which can be used to extend the functionality and make it customized to the requirements of Business operations and some of the main elements are Transfer Manager , Split criteria of the Business Volume Profile etc. 

I hope this is useful in assessing your  very first test in S4 HANA system and to reverse engineer the logic behind the process. 

I would like to blog over the Settlement Debate process in my next blog (Yes!! you have heard it right - not a credit memo but a debit memo process that I have recently implemented successfully) however I will wait for your reaction to this blog and proceed. Let me know your thoughts. Any suggestion is welcome. 

 

Thank you.

Regards,

Haripriya.V

entry.title: HOW TO CONFIGURE TWO REBATE BASIS IN THE BUSINESS VOLUME -WB2r_BUSVOL
entry.content:
Iam posting this We have one Requirement in  settlement  management

 

Currently we are getting the Rebate basis amount from each billing document ( we have configured condition type in the pricing and kept subtotal -7  from this it was captured business volume from each billing document under Rebate basis - wb2r_busvol )

 

Requirement

We have outside sales that will not be recorded in the sap system  ,now business want to do the settlement for the outside sales  - we brought the outside sales via Idoc and created sales and billing via Idoc we made separate billing type

 

Now we want to configure two  rebate basis

 

Under one rebate basis -1 regular sales need to be captured

Under 2nd Rebate basis-2 it should capture the outside sales related billings

 

Q-1 How we can configure two rebate basis in the Business volume table - Wb2r_busvol

Q-2 How to Get the second rebate basis into the settlement contract

Q-3  want to do outside and regular sales to be settled in one contract settlement. How to differentiate it

 

Thanks in advance 

Chaitanya

entry.title: Settlement error KD574
entry.content: How do i solve settlement error KD574, when a credit memo is charged against the project?
